description: An international freight agency mystery game platform based on Nuxt 4

scenario_descriptions.customs_declaration: Learn about customs declaration processes, handle complex customs procedures, and experience real customs work scenarios.
scenario_descriptions.sea_waybill: As a new freight agent, you need to handle a complex sea waybill, solve the mysteries, and ensure smooth cargo clearance.
scenario_descriptions.air_urgent: Handle urgent air cargo, coordinate resources, and complete high-difficulty transportation tasks within limited time.

updates.title: New Scenario: Cross-border E-commerce Logistics Challenge
updates.description: Experience the latest cross-border e-commerce logistics models and learn related international freight knowledge.

updates.title: System Optimization: Enhanced Learning Experience
updates.description: Optimized game loading speed and added more learning hint features.

updates.title: Knowledge Question Bank Update
updates.description: Added 20 new knowledge points about international trade terms.
